description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-ubuntu-18.04 that runs on a schedule, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs on pull requests except for the main branch. It should use an ubuntu-latest job to build and test p4c with GCC on Ubuntu 18.04, but only if the pull request has the run-ubuntu18 label or if the workflow is triggered on a schedule. The job should check out the repository with submodules and a fetch depth of 0, use ccache with a maximum size of 1000M, build a Docker image for testing, and run tests with ctest in a privileged Docker container.
